product.title: Kurgo Dog Core Cooling Vest - Summer Cooling Jacket - Evaporative Cooling Coat - Harness-Compatible - Reflective Accents - Grey - Small
product.description: Dogs can’t take off their fur coats—but with the Kurgo Dog Core Cooling Vest, they don't have to. Designed for hot summer days, this vest uses evaporative technology to help your pup stay cool and comfortable during outdoor adventures. Just soak the vest in cold water, wring it out, and strap it on. As the water evaporates, it draws heat from your dog’s body, making it a must-have for summer hikes, park days, and camping trips. The vest is made with lightweight polyester and lined with breathable air mesh, combining comfort with functionality. Its athletic cut offers a snug fit without restricting movement, and the light gray exterior helps reflect sunlight to reduce heat absorption. The design centers the cooling effect on your dog’s core—where it matters most—making it more efficient than standard dog shirts or jackets. Built for real-life usability, the vest includes a two-way zipper that gives you access to a collar or harness underneath. Adjustable side straps with quick-release buckles ensure a secure fit for dogs of various sizes, while reflective accents boost visibility during early morning runs or evening walks. When the cooling effect fades, simply rewet the vest to recharge it again. Whether you’re training on trails or relaxing at the lake, this cooling vest keeps your dog ready for whatever comes next. It’s durable, machine washable, and easy to pack—perfect for any adventure-ready pup. At Kurgo, we believe that life’s best moments happen when you and your dog explore the world together. That’s why every product we create is designed to make those adventures easier, safer, and more enjoyable. From trail-tested harnesses to travel-friendly accessories, our gear is made with high-quality materials and real-life usability in mind. Backed by a lifetime warranty, Kurgo products combine rugged durability with smart functionality—because your dog deserves gear that works as hard as they play. Let’s gear up and go together.
feature_bullets: Stay Cool on Every Adventure: The Kurgo Dog Core Cooling Vest helps prevent overheating in warm weather using an evaporative cooling coat design and lightweight cooling gear construction
Functional & Comfortable Fit: Features adjustable side straps and quick release buckles for secure, customizable wear that’s perfect for running, hiking, or everyday outings
Smart Features for Hot Weather: This dog cooling vest includes a two way zippered top for easy harness access, plus heat reflective fabric and high-visibility trim for safety
Designed for Real-World Adventures: Kurgo gear is built to solve everyday challenges with dogs, making travel, walks, and outdoor play safer, easier, and more fun for both of you
Durable Gear, Lifetime Promise: Engineered for longevity and reliability, every Kurgo product is crafted with rugged materials and backed by our industry-leading lifetime warranty

specifications.name: Item Package Dimensions L x W x H
Warranty Description
specifications.value: Lifetime warranty when purchased from authorized seller.

specifications.name: Care Instructions
specifications.value: Machine wash gentle or hand wash. Air dry.

local.title: Cool
local.text: Great job cooling in 111° kept his black hair cool 2the touch for 2hrs b4 needing 2wet again. We had 2go 2Dr & went 4ice cream later. Was worried it being so hot out but worked great! I wet down, wrung out then put in bag in fridge 1hr b4 putting on him. Worked better for longer in extreme weather. I also bring ice water 2re wet it when needed. Great fit, lightweight & his service vest fits over it & still worked great. He loves too. The straps however will drip a lot even after wringing out so will get car seat etc wet. Not great if in public doing a downstairs & leaving wet spot so bring small towel just in case
local.date: Reviewed in the United States on September 24, 2023

local.title: Works good 👍
local.text: If you live in Florida I wouldn't recommend because of how humid it is here BUT in the cooler weather or different climate this is a great product
local.date: Reviewed in the United States on September 15, 2025

local.title: Very helpful. Wish there were more sizes.
local.text: I really wish there was a size between the small and medium. My dog is 31 lbs, but long, so her measurements lined up with the small on the size chart. After reading the reviews I sized up. I had to cinch the straps way down, and it still gaps in the front. I tried the small as well, and while I could get it on her, it was hard to get over her head and the straps were pressing against her armpits. She was clearly not comfortable and I was worried about chafing and matting, so we stuck with the medium one. It's little on the pricy side, but I think it was worth it. It seems well made and smartly designed. I like the zippered opening to attach a leash to a harness. Underrated feature: the word "cooling" in large print on the vest. So far nearly all the people who have asked me why my dog is wearing a jacket in a heat wave have been too young to know how to read. My dog seems to like it, or at least doesn't mind it. Since it has to go over the head, it requires her cooperation, and she doesn't fight putting it on. Depending on the humidity, it dries fairly fast, but if I pour more water on her before it dries completely, it disperses through the whole thing pretty well, so I don't have to take it off and re-soak it. It's also held up well. I try to keep her out of brush with it on, but there's no stopping her from rolling in the grass. So far no tears or snags, and the dirt has just rinsed right out. Even in our humid weather, it does seem to make a difference on hot days. We can walk further, and her tongue doesn't end up hanging quite so far out. I've recommended it to several people who asked about it on walks, and after seeing it in action, my cousin bought the small off me for her dog so I didn't have to mess with a return.
local.date: Reviewed in the United States on July 25, 2022

local.title: Absolutely works exactly as described
local.text: I have a senior hound who is used to her 68-degree house and does not like heat. We took her out in 91 degrees today with this one and she didn't pant even once. I'm incredibly surprised how well this works. We made sure to keep it damp with cool water the whole time and not let it dry out. She was one happy pooch being able to have some sunshine without overheating. Thank you for this product! She is very deep-chested and 62 pounds, and needed a large size. We did buy a medium but had to send it back because it was too tight around her shoulders.
local.date: Reviewed in the United States on July 7, 2024

local.title: It got moldy within a few days
local.text: I love this brand. It fit my dog well the quality was nice. The size was great. The only issue I had with it is that it got moldy within a short time of me purchasing it. I returned it and bought a different style with the same brand and I’m very happy with that one.
local.date: Reviewed in the United States on December 21, 2025

local.title: Nicely cools and deflects sun.
local.text: I like the materials used, stays cool much longer than the cheap thin wannabe cooling vests. In Hawaii, it lasted a good 30 mins. It's never became hot to wear for my black lab. And I like the way it deflects the sun with the light color and the slight shimmer. It fit nicely under his working harness without obstruction. Would recommend. The clips and adjustments are easy and sufficient to keep the chest area touching the dog. To regenerate the cooling abilities, I simply poured cool water on it. The word "cooling" on the side answered questions before being asked. (That was nice to avoid one more distraction). I'm always asked questions about my service dog.
local.date: Reviewed in the United States on August 22, 2023

local.title: Works well
local.text: The cooling vest works very well for our black coat dog, soaking it ahead of our walk has kept him cool on very hot days. The fit is good around his neck and chest, sizing chart is accurate. Took one star off as the "hoops" that you slide the buckles through to secure the chest portion are very tight. This makes it more difficult if your dog does not sit perfectly still as you thread them through. Do wonder how long these hoops will last from normal wear including him rolling at times, can see them stressed and not much material to hold up.
local.date: Reviewed in the United States on September 23, 2025

local.title: A game changer in the Texas heat
local.text: We are having the Summer from Hell in Texas so I needed something to help keep my boys cool on their late In the evening walks. I soak these in the sink in cool water for about 10 minutes and then put them on before they head out with dad. As long as he doesn't stay gone too long, they are still a bit damp when they return. Best result is that they are not panting near as much, nor as long, as they did before I got the coats. They are easy to put on, and the fit is good after you get it initially adjusted. My dogs weigh 40-45 pounds (Border Collies), and the medium fits them well. There is also a nice loop on the side that the strap goes through that helps keep the strap from sliding forward when they walk.
local.date: Reviewed in the United States on August 27, 2023

global.title: لم يطابق المقاس
global.text: طلبت ارجاع المنتج ولم تتم الاستجابة

global.title: Good quality.
global.text: As described, fits my sproodle well and most importantly keeps him cool on our 2 hour walks.
global.date: Reviewed in the United Kingdom on June 18, 2023

global.text: Los abrigos son fáciles de poner y se ajustan bastante bien a toda la espalda: el fresco dura bien durante las caminatas de 30 a 40 minutos con calor y humedad que tomamos.

global.title: El mejor amigo de un bulldog en la playa.
global.text: The media could not be loaded. Perfecto, buenos acabados en la tela, si bien le quedo un poco largo, fue preferible para seguir manteniendo la fresca. La evaporación es lenta por ende, dura frío bastante tiempo.
